payload.text: I’ll make the license-only change locally: first I’ll inspect the root metadata files, then add/update only the license artifacts and run the requested diff/JSON validation if applicable.

There are unrelated existing workspace changes, mostly under `.relay` plus one IPC file. I’ll leave those alone and limit edits to root licensing files.

{
  "name": "relay",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "description": "Local-first Codex-driven kanban desktop app.",
  "main": "./out/main/index.js",
  "type": "module",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "electron-vite dev",
    "dev:logs": "electron-vite dev 2>&1 | tee /tmp/relay-dev.log",
    "build": "tsc --noEmit && electron-vite build",
    "clean:dist": "node scripts/package-electron.mjs --clean",
    "package:binary": "node scripts/package-electron.mjs",
    "dist": "npm run clean:dist && npm run build && npm run package:binary",
    "logs": "mkdir -p \"$HOME/Library/Application Support/relay\" && touch \"$HOME/Library/Application Support/relay/relay.log\" && tail -n 200 -f \"$HOME/Library/Application Support/relay/relay.log\"",
    "logs:dev": "touch /tmp/relay-dev.log && tail -n 200 -f /tmp/relay-dev.log",
    "preview": "electron-vite preview",
    "test": "node tests/run-tests.mjs",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@dnd-kit/core": "^6.3.1",
    "@dnd-kit/sortable": "^10.0.0",
    "@dnd-kit/utilities": "^3.2.2",
    "@openai/codex-sdk": "^0.130.0",
    "clsx": "^2.1.1",
    "effect": "4.0.0-beta.65",
    "gray-matter": "^4.0.3",
    "lucide-react": "^0.468.0",
    "react": "^19.0.0",
    "react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "ulid": "^2.3.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/node": "^22.10.2",
    "@types/react": "^19.0.2",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.0.2",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.3.4",
    "electron": "^33.2.1",
    "electron-vite": "^2.3.0",
    "typescript": "^5.7.2",
    "vite": "^5.4.11"
  }
}

`package.json` exists and has no `license` field, and there isn’t stronger owner metadata in the visible root package metadata. I’m going to add `LICENSE` with `2026 Robert Pitt` and add top-level `"license": "MIT"` to `package.json`; I’ll also inspect the README for conflicting license text using `grep` since `rg` is not installed here.

The README has no conflicting license text. The lockfile’s root package metadata mirrors package fields, so I’ll update that root lock entry too to keep package metadata consistent without touching dependency records.
The license and package metadata are updated. I’m running the requested diff plus JSON parsing on the edited package files now.

diff --git a/package.json b/package.json
index bf27d10..ea63333 100644
--- a/package.json
+++ b/package.json
@@ -2,6 +2,7 @@
   "name": "relay",
   "version": "0.1.0",
   "description": "Local-first Codex-driven kanban desktop app.",
+  "license": "MIT",
   "main": "./out/main/index.js",
   "type": "module",
   "private": true,

diff --git a/package-lock.json b/package-lock.json
index 9f1c11a..71cd5f5 100644
--- a/package-lock.json
+++ b/package-lock.json
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
     "": {
       "name": "relay",
       "version": "0.1.0",
+      "license": "MIT",
       "dependencies": {
         "@dnd-kit/core": "^6.3.1",
         "@dnd-kit/sortable": "^10.0.0",

The requested diff shows the package metadata change; because `LICENSE` is a new untracked file, Git does not include it in plain `git diff` yet. I’ll verify its contents directly and check final status.

MIT License

Copyright (c) 2026 Robert Pitt

Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy
of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"), to deal
in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights
to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or sell
copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the Software is
furnished to do so, subject to the following conditions:

The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included in all
copies or substantial portions of the Software.

THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR
IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY,
FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE
AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER
LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM,
OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE
SOFTWARE.

Implemented the MIT license ticket.

**Summary**
Added a root `LICENSE` with canonical MIT text using `2026 Robert Pitt`. Added `"license": "MIT"` to `package.json` and mirrored it in the root package entry of `package-lock.json`. No application source or UI files were changed.

**Files Changed**
- `LICENSE`
- `package.json`
- `package-lock.json`

**Commands Run**
- `ls`
- `find . -maxdepth 1 ...`
- `git status --short`
- `sed -n '1,220p' package.json`
- `grep -RInE "license|MIT|ISC|Apache|GPL|BSD|copyright" README.md package.json`
- `sed -n '1,80p' package-lock.json`
- `git diff -- LICENSE package.json README.md`
- `git diff -- package-lock.json`
- `sed -n '1,120p' LICENSE`

**Tests Run**
- `node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('package-lock.json','utf8'));"`  
  Result: passed.

**Subagent Usage**
None used.

**Remaining Risks / Follow-Up**
No known remaining risks. Existing unrelated workspace changes were left untouched.
